claim_limit: Exact after the stated ordinary-uniqueness premise; not an unconditional exhaustive classification theorem.

external_premise.claim: There is one ordinary S_11-isomorphism class of 20-block C(11,5,3) covers.
external_premise.claim_limit: The exact 20-class conclusion is conditional on this external uniqueness premise until its proof or an independent exhaustive certificate is obtained.
external_premise.source: G.H.J. van Rees, Three Constructions of Covers, JCMCC 16 (1994), 19-25, p.22; attribution there is to W.H. Mills, private communication.
external_premise.status: reported in peer-reviewed primary literature; proof/census certificate not located

hard_tail_hypothesis.falsifier: The exact matching split assigns no missing class to one or both hard prefixes.
hard_tail_hypothesis.statement: The two 60-second survivors remain open because the nine-orbit blocker omits ordinary-cover/fixed-matching embeddings routed through those prefixes.
